Pretorin Developer & Agent Docs
Canonical docs base: https://pretorin-ai.github.io/pretorin-cli/
Audience: developers and AI agents using Pretorin via the CLI, MCP, and skill-driven workflows.

Start here:
- Introduction: https://pretorin-ai.github.io/pretorin-cli/introduction.html
- Installation: https://pretorin-ai.github.io/pretorin-cli/getting-started/installation.html
- Authentication: https://pretorin-ai.github.io/pretorin-cli/getting-started/authentication.html
- Quick Start: https://pretorin-ai.github.io/pretorin-cli/getting-started/quickstart.html

High-value sections:
- CLI command reference: https://pretorin-ai.github.io/pretorin-cli/cli/command-reference.html
- MCP overview: https://pretorin-ai.github.io/pretorin-cli/mcp/overview.html
- MCP setup: https://pretorin-ai.github.io/pretorin-cli/mcp/setup.html
- MCP tools: https://pretorin-ai.github.io/pretorin-cli/mcp/tools.html
- MCP resources: https://pretorin-ai.github.io/pretorin-cli/mcp/resources.html
- MCP troubleshooting: https://pretorin-ai.github.io/pretorin-cli/mcp/troubleshooting.html
- Agent overview: https://pretorin-ai.github.io/pretorin-cli/agent/overview.html
- Skills: https://pretorin-ai.github.io/pretorin-cli/agent/skills.html
- Runtime management: https://pretorin-ai.github.io/pretorin-cli/agent/runtime.html

Key workflows:
- Narrative and evidence workflow: https://pretorin-ai.github.io/pretorin-cli/workflows/narrative-evidence.html
- Campaign workflows: https://pretorin-ai.github.io/pretorin-cli/workflows/campaigns.html
- Policy and scope questionnaires: https://pretorin-ai.github.io/pretorin-cli/workflows/policy-scope.html
- Vendor inheritance: https://pretorin-ai.github.io/pretorin-cli/workflows/vendor-inheritance.html
- Gap analysis: https://pretorin-ai.github.io/pretorin-cli/workflows/gap-analysis.html
- Gap analysis example: https://pretorin-ai.github.io/pretorin-cli/workflows/gap-analysis-example.html
- Artifact generation: https://pretorin-ai.github.io/pretorin-cli/workflows/artifacts.html
- Cross-framework mapping: https://pretorin-ai.github.io/pretorin-cli/workflows/cross-framework.html
- STIG scanning: https://pretorin-ai.github.io/pretorin-cli/workflows/stig-scanning.html

Reference:
- Supported frameworks: https://pretorin-ai.github.io/pretorin-cli/frameworks/supported.html
- Control ID formats: https://pretorin-ai.github.io/pretorin-cli/frameworks/control-ids.html
- Framework selection guide: https://pretorin-ai.github.io/pretorin-cli/frameworks/selection.html
- Environment variables: https://pretorin-ai.github.io/pretorin-cli/reference/environment.html
- Artifact schema: https://pretorin-ai.github.io/pretorin-cli/reference/artifact-schema.html
- Contributing: https://pretorin-ai.github.io/pretorin-cli/reference/contributing.html
- Trademarks and service terms: https://pretorin-ai.github.io/pretorin-cli/reference/trademarks.html
- Changelog: https://pretorin-ai.github.io/pretorin-cli/reference/changelog.html

Notes:
- The docs focus on CLI, MCP, skills, and workflows rather than raw API reference.
- Pretorin-hosted platform access is authenticated and governed separately by platform terms.
